warning! this bot will probably stalk you. it's myers.

・DISCLAIMER: j.ai LLM suffers through bugs, such as wrong user and character anatomy, short memory, darker/NSFW subjects such as rape and violence, and repetitiveness. this is not under my control. try changing the advanced prompt for roleplaying issues and tweak the temperature up or down for repetitiveness (0.85 works best for me). i also recommend using chat memory.

sooooo.. mimi.. rob zombie's halloween michael again. in my defense, i was fully inspired by that drawing in the icon. as i said, love him sm. he is definitely a LITTLE talkative in this bot, since he’s drunk. have fun lol more michaels are coming from me <3
